body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RY-hPhV7EYtoP0oyYE22BkVPntH-PHlT7ctpDZWa1rMDJo_qpCstJC2QAejq5c8hoNlgLvy7L9qbdBILzC_pNuU7oZIf-MOKXhH98JyxKPYIHgzvMIv3OY5yaRB9EIn9e7XrECt51wawFcl7GkI6ZSgN7vAWhBhyc9bTHEujcqgZ56-Cjx6-_4uqT1MAyOjxAMcvcu1Kh4PSaH6ImktJai9E%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RY0gRFnCcLoiFgaGwVndV9HUUzMzkQqOX9pWULWax4ZR_-H97h-QomOW4NZaaFSLJIt95dCjCXDH_BfgybsBMsOOPDtk-J7U58o0vfLHc3qa8YvUGvSlrblAxGBeY8K-XZ5tL0hOWLjYiiNj6HpxA-cHddVU1v8Vka5LOVytb-Rrn2fFhpffwvGsEbyvopRe35g7X0JvOykeFOFL1v9LDyWs%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RYwhdYCIFCeznW-vqM4YIXRj5iyGytCuMpublRX1gmCQokLNaXEas7xoWdqQo-OS454k-rH25xBSDq-ee1ThB0lM7XnG9vGqKwc5ZFPKUZZjUPcJTLcClLf-O7b8NrsdKbBMS1H3D2Ho6G3ncCMhNs15z088yY9ugQeR7My-Uxe-q1XgiOxsX-8adf8sb0H_GBqQbG5b8qplWFKGgq7cpziM%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RY1nT-TxuC-Lru4ZlWQuMN6Ua4I_RCVXllV0H0NpBzCa14N5q6uXu0DAz4K0ArQ7RD1wVGhzNDZpPSDieVGvnUqv7r30_Qh1lB8ktAKVn-KrgfiF2YRzzb30M1xGs5cGeZ9xvQPGdRoqwDpKdf10X1Q-wv2SPJv0fszWApQDasAgfLpABgxholqil2Q3zLAZXL9QUg3fxYFW-2UDeH39O41A%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RYxPwWJsi9OIdgJ1vkPBFNHMZWpvcArV6OKz2D2M0P32M7qXth0cPMOcRilyVslgBX0FyfrkEiD6ww4fci1W3RPdBFDPU4C3aqPbb7ZjomtNh_hXtcYWAMZ87YjUuu8l5DKAsCGgQA7exwpop7WLKJdYnpBAkJTe62m1kmafLSlDTkbACaW27QF-4PL_-Ivb5sHRhYle1kptrGl64Dbthw24%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RY3T5vgAWQ6YAQeF1KTw-s8K2NPzx02ySEl0uIW5QzZpniUO0ykLoE9lHRc0nX6qphMceZQvoyNS_7NTkGkUA7EyI_F83etIqqYMEp25L_32hPB85ofm66zHFIBDYS3ri7rCJqbJGEE61Ns8hWa_UKdPo_b95KZ0ox4aqk9VL-_IUi_0MGH9yg5FhypEsEVj-WdQtV9LwpCWMtSYvfi7jCrA%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=519cd757393d4e149705102c76246a91&_e=0GsifSD1PCFlgdp9kG_A3jAyHjXxmUOZ55LAhtYNHkNrYcJBC8wpBlS-7p__Vg2qA-tXtnjpytydwQhD42lPqnnBQkDUKcF81ToTWh-Wfcqm-gzUNAljxntSWzcLephwQ5pEp5TA3G2JUXX_12RbgZeW6rmA98iO6Z6vbzEdNXSq0I8EGmdBtrTU-8fC_NEiOB_a4uy7kGPhrfg1ovb-d9F3eNVctyiiuhuDpdJD8IQIqRmRudbeIksgk8m6_YwA-qeOhg2XT9uo23BBP8-RY_C23YUSZg8h2Pab798At-rn7s-OKAcid675nP2RFXyIHuCVDKQwV5O_CrI3JKXRqMzZKNQjXk2pky1iI0bYYIfNkp7Sj4qSnqejPb3XCzhZn07oETCr7psKXGi8wgR0FLQINB_lT9-0MX0-8Grsq6olx4Fy8d715c-EL4eHLtOeP-AfZepxeqquIOYXso8cO7HV7JrClzWXhvhpRY56Q6Y%3D)** Thank you.

body:
We need to hold them accountable... | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGD3Kza8Yn-poXRwyE6OTPrti5iQvFN3Xcmg-a5bGLFYpLkEwmO7jIPLNjBNPAAPru576nen5x2EI3rNU0c6cBV4qLZKDDO48wBFgj3OxB8WTIrCVEZoy6qXcLD9RWurtQ3VsHMcYoIk-Da94CzfHLj0vcgvznwpX-08_HcizwXbfox55heFH3EHL_KJTUk_PHf1ftuNDbZjBVTCF4yr9K1YyQpkdU8_l0abFcJyZmeqQBlJbvED2QmxpXW7lgO-FRa_1yTAtQm4xzaAcM6pFYnL0hn2Ifbf2eXrdPxyufnn2rRxTLC0trianep_T1LSir8i9zGpw7z07bF7txWbV_v97MKipe5AK2myqXz8QDGtn/3fu/d9gdqQDXSK6AaVE-jAMslw/h0/34qKd9PmjmwMpLasH9SH4QZ7DZ8uECDfZ67YjL8YJq4)
On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our Democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Now, it’s reported that they brought stockpiles of weapons to the Capitol. Some even invaded the building carrying guns. Despite the tragic outcome -- despite the assault on Democracy -- and despite insurrectionists carrying GUNS onto the U.S. Capitol grounds and threatening elected officials, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened, what exactly transpired that day, and how we can stop one from ever happening again._

**[With Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin doubling down on Trump’s lies with so-called “election integrity rallies,” we want to know -- do you support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpeDvTvOgjrTXzcHquR7Jb6DalR7KfvFO-cB5TnWcusQr047J9FtYf2xwLWdvtWzKHJx8ku35f__P1iIHxI7W4R2u670tbecnf3msIFkRrSG66NZCzbXWvoZHeRYYo_XZdmyT4RF3Jg9zHWKWw61YQjYxk07eGog7Fu99SuI8u_r8ovtpbexuAUaxHiV0oSEack-Gd7lPXZmvhHtISr4RnCHCYk2Mfk8PK214spansCEJyE4JD858BWsUhYhPq1jt1jn622DAnoL1CUafIeptz-0sYTMEZz8zdOrNGtugIG_P/3fu/d9gdqQDXSK6AaVE-jAMslw/h1/oNVGPdjrqH6E50xse5XNLWw62gabDQTMqRJpXZA1QBI)** **[ YES ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpdg464uPOSlneGlBX8l3ik9cbYkFoR9Q-woT55uc9zo6HyVb2jIILHo9abN7j9baw_rovrscSUmr8V1mgFS9FbYmZuvr0tXQcrl7-f0d9Dm3Tz08iQyqYJ4rJgUByibrhmycqFOVWZXYn7tqqFL-4b3V1MGuJgablOvVxgr5wvTCOCuCOCbKFsdtFbcPsVf4wRYMKBS5FveY0s1D3fbJ8fKl49Menw5uzjBAPlxgehxn738JLVrQxMfBegAg5uynuIVsLg-vNmKuIzz-ynGjx8Ay-Rs9rJ7_Tsrr0MFqID2r/3fu/d9gdqQDXSK6AaVE-jAMslw/h2/nf8Ad-imQjlnWMzdzgh_ea0IpB_c2jpHLIudLN_JY3w)

In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression policies to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia.

We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable

clean_body: We need to hold them accountable... | | | On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our Democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz. Now, it’s reported that they brought stockpiles of weapons to the Capitol. Some even invaded the building carrying guns. Despite the tragic outcome -- despite the assault on Democracy -- and despite insurrectionists carrying GUNS onto the U.S. Capitol grounds and threatening elected officials, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies. That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened, what exactly transpired that day, and how we can stop one from ever happening again. Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression policies to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia. We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgtDcOYNpLh-HU_4wyBiPuOf-6gBBdBTeJlKTNcO70rwRzm9DQ42JGqexcJBsE06GOnMd6O-995Qa_g47gMuw4Pk3k2aa2x8wHaZqe7gq5Qexju4xb9sUj-qzVUzIcPGN28OWy7oJZCJcta5nEU1OM6vHndFfcCHxLsvzpspGYh9vHFVnnMGZPQd1UxlwAieo7SKWedfVpOPdbivaON-Zcuw%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgja1vUXYTsG5ihrn_zoZi4-ZrA-G-xJinTYoA8kGwjJi3ItTlBPJAaFkdaD0cMbyB5oghG3RdH22Z5jAMalLn9xAd0nGXNh57LWIhLkqfg8uK7hHsO56mTOaqr5olmQAXVOlIpBB9hM5jLc6dCznZ0jpE-t3eIyxmSvqyFFulmFwhqtdOZ9TiOm7ZJ9HixGapxbD9lgf2w7bgwfeInXxH38%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgg2Th0tHEQlGsJ0qGyQUX9TpOJ5VGgzRKluRuGEWNXs3yhUpm6WoNVmIzGOg542JLQATW_locKZ48NPr8lJkcFr51kw6hMp-RrscXA7jLJyOxen33U-D0gxQ0WQjgtMuP1sONZRlsridAbngYZ7E-QfJlOwHujVPXvzTzDx9H6TDPAxY98pzb1O2KuVRhWaaxY1tY4xjxxvE2dN63-1cWNw%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgrobWvqmZFaTv-P9m_cG4Vst1McUvSan2B7TR41nKMLoaFcd2z9UsHE5_tWASIUS93h-siFXIBqsgbbyqciU_B2McpFFb9dGteuS4LjtnaQo0vIP4hEzDWvPc7EwvuErD-YNRSgG1KH3D9Ew7GyJVQqUOn3Ty3uzrIojkX-_6FecxDICt_3vybqqKosBKTgUcCQfYtbX4IXDv7dI1JOJfOw%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgr9wBdCTpyjApUDCJTCyGEEA_0K8NhfcfyZMDTF9vLLmf87Oclh9j8Al6qm4eJQdbs4x5P4U4PpvaKKn09gW9rWzMCbO4sZX988Kpnz_AfwnM1OuGxj1nh9KAAljlyfcEUYXE7BvANYnMHe8FIHMNFx7X1Uxcn9azbXBnxnmFtARqdVhDfI__zD8vSeYbmHtwwQ4MqGWJpW3xwfg7WZZxhU%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgrRWQKckZSvsN3dZSUTXAs8Hd6Z3a23ddKf0r6KgYrSJDDdGqWcfIcJoOziIB2_kRv9XI5eLfYjls4SeGyIvUUEPTxbKmtvTCi6vT7swQIzfUk7bdR3fS-XdFib-MmDvQJQIZCjUBYRNGLed8sl5nwXbm9eIqTiyKwnZuvz7vsoJEKkrgXiLut6ZhN5Nu2cL1K89FrjnDLs6F1B6oDgGX6Q%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgj5-WbJ1VejEMh3f4xroJLz5opI1D5mFiEZeqUEBZhOwXv_looYRaU0I7gYmFDBgCFPCYEd-hUxnbGM7cBcqXC6FY3paMi3mUqd1fFJeCjLcc9t3osPSdcwQGQSRFAsWOp6BJYHJrV1l7fkazy-fwXoMLXI18jdQHuIJQCXKw2gWJEgXuDcAN65_oL0trE5A9DssPxyTOyUom3SQHd_MVqk%3D)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ad177856afa437aa674202727648023&_e=qyVMSwJLL5HhDhfFAugHlGHG6VyStuQW017CNRedOrjRhLx2I-3egisPWFQhe57f5nbE35E3qC8NFAUcJOBd5yn7Kpl-nyzLUxaBuBpzDsSR4GMxcEzy9okuuccTfAXTTTX2UOwsVIn8tiubtXPCMFADYT-sMBvKwqOAMcm6ocEr-XE3Ux8BhriPY1TGL1JeCtyMRLeXvcwsMdW_2d-fiZamWZ23pQDauYCBXa_rZzT06MzxUzl4xFbA9YO__a1SwqTM3G7SuumwSR9BMUqEgpyTnWaVNxzZNxF6VuGOsWXE1SOXRknMVeFbpVSFF6McYnmKeW-9JbBeslGoLO_xyKICt00VS8a61vsEM7RWu5RUwWJobEDHU9t5fPqJyh98t-D604taMKTzggUc8gFmhZcP4P16ahtzlz4H5WntQ2qUWgW9xfQOD3c2egCGmq7FH1jSqQkxi2tLHTBK_BzwK_GB6HK6yqMN3QTowNIMfow%3D)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfg1pdkufls85nvcc5jnl6rtripobu700sed9ea0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr1m013hm4lacuuiu943p1rma2v1jtgj1feu1jc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z76otjtgbtum1c92r3185qm56kbn4ga8o6oq4jno_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zstqh6st9f9neh8dbesoe5lqne386h3ihejt6o30_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zee5ur1dnplerol566ehc4jhisml8bsj92mq3vk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9ne7s2lpm9q5tf7lemcbaqt1om74pe9nmi1kpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu26pr5spfhl2hiqo228kga3m7d3cirqrt46njg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9im1o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onksapncpj16tjj0p9m6pjred3mmtir7cb7c1rredb0eipnct71moor4tdim9oj1oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z21lr6bg5fivpobnfluigbjmb72vef026d1da0po_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cph6ao70sph649fg)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8dg54fg6frh1ecr5sjkl3g4cp3b7c3nsbm1ofh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm0or6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmcppb8t3mclgrapjiekrm8c3he9pj6tpk69pb0t1nc3g6dcbie3hm6tdkmdij0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cr66jgbbc37m9pmcc5gm9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6cii7oul26uef6475bd335qtfera4nr1vj2l7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm0or6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z22o1e06r3jd1bo00fqn2uceglf2tjbsttulh078_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm0or6chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zprsm5e4497jvd7l93f76b86ppumk518fol9ghs0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm0or6chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Right Team Trump just texted us asking about YOU!
subject: Why haven't you responded to Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| **TEAM TRUMP JUST TEXTED US ASKING ABOUT YOU!**
---
Peter,

_We couldn 't believe it_... **but this morning Team Trump texted us asking about YOU.** They said **YOUR NAME IS STILL MISSING** and that President Trump is asking about YOU. [**Please DON 'T MAKE PRESIDENT TRUMP WAIT ANY LONGER. THIS IS YOUR LAST CHANCE TO DONATE AND HELP PROTECT HIS LEGACY - WE'LL BE SENDING HIM A LIST OF EVERYONE WHO STEPS UP RIGHT NOW!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58456686:61yfzV2Ng:m:1:3253819041:BBDA8EACBDF348E34120D02D69684118:r)

body:

Friend,
---
| Kids are finally returning to school... but now, states across the nation are attempting to**FORCE them into masks for 8 hours a day.**

**_[Will you sign the petition, demanding that your governor END mask mandates for our kids?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zaa2pqopffta5er52no9l0g14nd7qnjinok0loeg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm2oj4cth2bs "Will you sign the petition, demanding that your governor END mask mandates for our kids?")_******(Just supply your ZIP code and we'll make sure it goes _directly_ to your governor's desk.)

---
| COVID-19 poses virtually no threat to kids... but radicals are forcing them to suffer.

For nearly 2 years, **kids have had their education ripped away** from them... as proficiency plunges in basic skills like math and reading.

Now, **radicals are prepared to make them suffer even more** by forcing masks on their faces... even though studies show they make _no difference whatsoever._

We've got to fight for America's kids, Friend. **_[Sign the petition to your governor, demanding he or she STOP mask mandates in schools.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi1erh1uke079q1005lp37lnifefvqu6cf4ea4t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9hm2oj4cth2bs "Sign the petition to your governor, demanding he or she STOP mask mandates in schools.")_** (Just supply your ZIP code--we'll take care of the rest!)

| Thanks, Candace

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Matching is back, here’s why →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
read this, it’s important
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36942269/309600354/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.2_TM_10P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDZkMS00OTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP9R9CcvAhM9qyIH4ggGOK7tUrWdsxezA_Xu-gYX98s=)

| | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: **this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.**

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** Polls show a razor thin margin, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats.

**That’s why we’ve launched a one-day match opportunity today, Derek:** we’ve got to get October off on the right foot and hit tonight’s $250,000 goal because _we won’t have much time to make up ground if we miss._

_**[So right now, will you chip in $30 to my campaign? I need all hands on deck to reach tonight’s $250,000 goal and your donation will be matched if you chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36942270/309600355/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.2_TM_10P&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDZkMS00OTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP9R9CcvAhM9qyIH4ggGOK7tUrWdsxezA_Xu-gYX98s=)**_ | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36942271/309600356/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.2_TM_10P&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDZkMS00OTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP9R9CcvAhM9qyIH4ggGOK7tUrWdsxezA_Xu-gYX98s=)**

name: Team Hoan
subject: Meet Hoan Huynh, Progressive Democrat for IL-05
body:
A Vietnamese refugee, the son of a U.S. Veteran, and a community impact investor... | | | |
---|---
| | Hi Peter, My name is Hoan Huynh and I am excited to announce that I am running for the U.S. House of Representatives in Illinois’ 5th District. I’m starting out my campaign by reaching out to you to ask for your support! I am a Vietnamese refugee, an innovator, a social impact investment professional, an entrepreneur, and a human rights advocate. I'm running for U.S. Congress to represent Illinois' 5th district because _we need to build forward, not just build back to what we had before the pandemic. Things were not working then, and we need to do better for everyone._ Parents and families are working multiple jobs to pay the bills. They work hard, they get up early and come home late, but find themselves falling further behind. People all over the district are facing the decision of whether to pay for medical care or their rent. This is not ok. In Congress I will fight for:
* Medicare for All;
* An economy that works for everyone by focusing on small business promotion and fair wages for workers
* Ending gun violence
* Clean energy and tech innovation to push America forward

For the past 12 years, the current representative has not listened to the needs of Illinois' 5th district. He has done nothing to fight for working and middle-class families. For students. For seniors. Or for our Veterans. Instead, he takes millions of dollars from military defense companies and big corporations and votes for their special interests. **Remember this name: Hoan Huynh (pronounced Hahn Win).** I believe that community-based solutions are the best path forward because those working closest with the issues are the ones best equipped to solve them. **[Watch this video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36955114/309636000/2078279051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTIzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhkM2Y2My01ZDI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YLHPlvJhdiV5SfyWxzgfapsVF2rGBDfDlgdwBeevQw=&emci=bd397166-68c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3c8d3f63-5d24-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=23594680)** to hear it straight from me...._we cannot sit back and watch Chicagoans beg their representatives for action._ We need innovative and bold solutions so that we can create a more equitable place for ALL. There is no more time to waste! I can't do this alone, I need you on my team in this fight. Could you take a moment to **[share Hoan's video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36955117/309636027/2078279051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTIzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhkM2Y2My01ZDI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YLHPlvJhdiV5SfyWxzgfapsVF2rGBDfDlgdwBeevQw=&emci=bd397166-68c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3c8d3f63-5d24-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=23594680)** on social media? We need your help to spread the word and demand progressive action in Congress now. Sincerely, Hoan Huynh
Progressive Democrat for Congress IL-05 _P.S. Have you followed us on social media yet? We are going to be out and about in the district and would love to bring you along. _ |
---|---

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8852%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yVpfvMbJRfLU0LZlpRRADQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15516%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gIjoTp2vObJlNe%2fHb9gJPw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15517%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CEQ3IWxZE%2b%2bKwEzTIGJvCA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15518%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SqHMTukXPuAABSnyqVsp8g&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8852%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yVpfvMbJRfLU0LZlpRRADQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8852%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yVpfvMbJRfLU0LZlpRRADQ&sysid=1)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: People think we have a snowball’s chance in hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XmzzC_nVTIOUwhaONiYTL0c-O-fOqiwccsf7tD5zAi93phS0iP78HgKyRjgcSDLerW2RZ4IjzOYm1QUuVUjggjrTOoTFZb7828erjqyROpWXYG82UffOePqxuV6nCr6604nV8qD_E9WFMLn5fPeoZKBngdHc2jLEFkd5XYOblA-i0NYsx6_t_m2hICVxZYYo-bH9OsZPFUS_aE7RbiKlVIH5kZwRg7gpLiT8ScIIi6ArNTWRHGitFWD8hoKicDsEMewM0vWLzYqD2g4w84fvsk3WnBVy_161gbTqxDwNdLFUyNbAfvI2bmQgFgDU21BN6A/3fu/Yr_blXfIRoC9FzisXavnTQ/h0/GWQcZEyvIVR9YxAWPrPoqkMjkS64Z11cdf3DDzTXxDo)
Derek --

Some folks think we have a snowball’s chance in hell of winning this U.S. Senate race and flipping Ohio’s open seat blue. They just go on and on (and on) about how Donald Trump won this state.

**You know what I think? NEVER bet against Ohio.**

There’s no secret sauce to winning tough elections beyond hard work and staying focused on what matters most to the people you hope to serve. No matter where you live, everyone wants their representatives to fight for living wages, affordable health care, and good-paying jobs in our communities.

But Mitch McConnell and his big-money donors have no interest in that. For too long, they’ve run rampant in Washington, allowing special interests to pull the strings behind closed-door meetings.

**Well, I am sick and tired of special interests calling the shots while everyday folks get ignored. And if you’re with me, I need your help to flip Ohio’s Senate seat blue.**

[**National Republicans will spend MILLIONS to buy this race and retake the Senate majority. We've got an important goal coming up, so can you split a donation of $25 right now between my campaign and Common Good VA?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XmzzC_nVTIOUwhaONiYTL0fcIu_fYGMGL9Mpf9Ul7-G9eE3g3jfvlB7Slaah6ZdHHOfoNzqXkzH3a1LZePYYfYLKCxeSLTZCtRp-lIaJmEHnsvgTeGOm_OKeDQ-rSAEw3N90XrVHzLTcarDrhf3U8ZS9lwxhy5GEVmO_yCH743nDDDCFFndw2EizHAIzvDzCSaWM_XPr9HClEHgqkQ9mu7nY63wwEvFb3G1xJ4rwBywyKf8dbmb_BK-Y9WWDdHI2WC3YZLmiygaZ2ALIUJxYYlAWw8jEHcrzoL_8DLbzcnlkC6plCxfiWovEUNRUPlXIrA/3fu/Yr_blXfIRoC9FzisXavnTQ/h1/K1bzoG8_ndjnizin-i6U7cL5fCN-fTWLOcpwyW9L_jc) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XmzzC_nVTIOUwhaONiYTL0fJlXNBiw3D8ILDveIzkxval8hCSsIu3_kheVp3oOkaonS5Hm9VLzH9Ct9VNpKjjqbc-dSCUiwbtnzz7MRc3O5bKvk4qg6w1J72EOqhgxLf6PyNkmmBv8xW1LA5tQPw_qGrG-57asuMd6HYRqKL3iioW8ddcgS_WMznMINmJ8zSkjiJvK-kSeYkxS1X04X5nB0sw0AcWKyc0F7fa8iGqa-5L4g4nsTvgMgmaG5ZAS6o4mBZWndukK-W0fNdukLG6ae4mEP3WtWx7DkkAqGhWLaEHTj_Wozklrpic-lU_SPmFQ/3fu/Yr_blXfIRoC9FzisXavnTQ/h2/aQ083-ru5EEkQsc9XmguXOngIoKAOlGsCob98xTIGL4)

At every step of the way, I’ve been genuinely humbled by the outpouring of support from so many Tennesseans who are fed up with the lies and division plaguing our politics. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36963297/309653866/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_na_20211003thankyou_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVlNzBlMy02YzI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nn1rsAJIzLoKDgBAHG2bSnm2jMTF--WkZw3FuF-gmN8=)

Hey Peter. This is just a quick note to say _**THANK YOU**_ for supporting our campaign and helping us reach our goal before the end of the quarter. It’s incredible to think that it was only a little more than a month ago that we launched this campaign to bring real leadership back to Tennessee. At every step of the way, I’ve been genuinely humbled by the outpouring of support from so many Tennesseans who are fed up with the lies and division plaguing our politics. Because of supporters like you, we’re in a good position to go up against Bill Lee next November. We won’t let up now — we can’t, because the lives of so many Tennesseans depend on it — but I’m proud to have you on our team as we buckle up for the next 13 months. Together, we’ll reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. Together, Tennessee thrives. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: Re: Georgia’s Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — My friend Adam asked me to reach out, and in a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our midnight deadline — the first of the new fundraising quarter — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.** My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. clean_body: | Derek — My friend Adam asked me to reach out, and in a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our midnight deadline — the first of the new fundraising quarter — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it. My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue. But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, Derek. My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you. – Sen. The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout.

With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to **every single corner of Virginia** , get mailers in **every single Virginia mailbox** , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: In the face of well-financed efforts
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58457048:60VnSV2NK:m:1:3253819041:76E7D32F50F4D8DD12DB1F1A25A090AE:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58457048:60VnSV2NK:m:1:3253819041:76E7D32F50F4D8DD12DB1F1A25A090AE:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58457048:60VnSV2NK:m:1:3253819041:76E7D32F50F4D8DD12DB1F1A25A090AE:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You were added to the system March 29, 2021.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zot127k3q3q0l0apdifk0enrp4g5m0mav9eo3lu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ge2o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcaf2afd0fccrjcvdgq6a5q426bum31gdc5vll1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ge2o34c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thank you for stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I wanted to personally reach out and tell you how grateful I am for your support. You’ve stepped up time and time again, helping us reach our early goals and build a robust on-the-ground campaign that will allow us to communicate with voters across the Granite State. Having your support this early on in the race is critical to holding onto my seat and protecting our fragile Senate majority. The following thirteen months will be an uphill battle. The path to the Senate runs through New Hampshire, and Republicans will do and say whatever they can to flip this seat red and take back Senate control. **I’m no stranger to tough fights. I know we can win this, but it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together.** With our Democratic majority, we've been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan, helping to support small businesses, lower health care costs, and deliver tax cuts for families. I’m committed to continuing this work, but that’s only possible with you standing by my side. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan P.S. We just closed our books for the quarter, but with McConnell's hand-picked candidate eyeing this seat and another far-right candidate already running against me, we can't afford to lose momentum now. **[If you can, please consider chipping in to start October off strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36966022/309662142/-214106137?refcode=e20211003_mwh-ty&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJhNjliMi03NjI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FceRlrgS2H2LU79dQ1591XFyTWtEjVxpXSlJkGKCLo=)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Drought
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
A moment I’ll never forget and always love to share is when I got out of my seat on my first trip to space and saw Earth from orbit for the first time.
#

Friends,
A moment I’ll never forget and always love to share is when I got out of my seat on my first trip to space and saw Earth from orbit for the first time.
Seeing our planet, everywhere you’ve ever been and everyone you’ve ever known, as a blue ball floating in the blackness of space, you realize we’re all in this together.
But I’ll also tell you that between my first and fourth trips to space, I witnessed significant changes in our planet that would make it clear to anyone that climate change threatens our way of life.
And there is no Planet B.
One specific issue that’s impacting Arizona right now is drought.
As some of you know, Arizona gets about 40 percent of our water from the Colorado River, and the government recently announced the river’s first-ever drought restrictions.
That means beginning next year, Arizona faces cutbacks from our Colorado River water supply.
This problem isn't limited to Arizona, and it’s one Congress must tackle.
So today, I am asking you to make your voice heard on this issue:
[**Sign my petition urging Congress to take action on climate change, including water recycling, resilience, desalination, and more.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition?source=em211003-1-15&t=1&akid=1469%2E6688874%2E1H08B7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition?source=em211003-1-15&t=2&akid=1469%2E6688874%2E1H08B7)**
Securing Arizona’s, and our country’s, water future is an urgent priority. Congress needs to know you see it that way as well.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1469%2E6688874%2E1H08B7).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

clean_body: | = | | We asked and you answered, Peter. Last month, the team asked you why you wanted to see Madison Cawthorn unseated from Congress -- and more importantly, why you’re a part of Team Jasmine. = | | | = We read all of your responses and here’s what some of you said: | "Jasmine represents NC the way I want to be represented- with intelligence, character, and love!" \-- Pamela | "I want to see him [Cawthorn] defeated because he has consistently shown that he does not care about the citizens of WNC. Instead he seems focused on only building his personal MAGA brand." -- Jennifer | "We need more truth and love in our political discourse. Hate and violence are not the answer." \-- Robert | "I want a person to defeat Cawthorn who knows how to think, who is centered in her own life, is willing to be herself and think for herself. I know Jasmine and have always been very impressed by her. I want Cawthorn defeated, and I want his replacement to be Jasmine, because I believe she has the ability, the wisdom, the courage to represent all of WNC." -- Joe For starters, we want to thank everyone who shared their reasons and stories with us. After reading every comment that was submitted, the message is loud and clear: we know that you all want change brought to Western NC -- and so do we. We are a people-powered movement seeking to meet voters where they are and work together so that everyone has a seat at the table. But our opponent is backed by right-wing special interest groups with millions of dollars working against us. = | | = | | = | | = | | = In this together, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Team Fetterman
subject: Meet Levi Fetterman:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Will you give Levi Fetterman a boop on the nose?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211003-2867-header&t=1&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)
Peter,
We've been sending a lot of _serious_ emails about a lot of _serious_ fundraising deadlines recently.
So we thought we'd take a step back today to reintroduce a very special member of Team Fetterman: **Levi Fetterman!**
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32332?refcode=em20211003-2867&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)**
Levi is the Official Dog of Pennsylvania. He is also a Twitter emotional support dog, Gisele's soulmate, and a rescue advocate. Oh, and he's a _very_ good boy.
We *think* Levi is around four years old. He was a chain dog and was rescued thanks to the great people at The Foster Farm animal shelter in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32332?refcode=em20211003-2867&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)
Levi is vocal on issues that matter to him and to his fellow Pennsylvanians. Including (but not limited to) good pats and belly rubs. And Levi — just like you, Peter — is a crucial and dedicated part of this team that wants to see John Fetterman fighting for us in the U.S. Senate!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32332?refcode=em20211003-2867&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)
[**_Now that you've met, we've got a request: Will you give Levi Fetterman a boop on the nose? When you do, you'll have a chance to donate $5 or any amount you can directly to Levi's human (John Fetterman) as he fights to flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat blue in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32332?refcode=em20211003-2867&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)
Thanks for taking the time to meet our furry friend Levi. He loved meeting you, too.
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211003-2867-footer&t=6&refcode2=2867_434096_dzYJmW&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2867%2E434096%2EdzYJmW)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Franchot
subject: Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We’re just reaching out to make sure that you heard about our upcoming Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening on Saturday, October 9. Peter Franchot is excited to spend the afternoon sharing his bold vision for the future of our state with voters, and we hope that you will be able to join us! Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]
Our Grand Opening is a FREE event. This will be an action-packed community day with free food, activities for kids, and live entertainment -- so make sure to bring your friends and family!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]Peter Franchot understands that this historic moment demands bigger ideas and bolder action than our state has seen in more than a generation. That’s why he’s running on a bold agenda that will ensure that no community is left behind as we continue to recover from this crisis.
We hope to see you at our Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening so that you can speak with Peter directly about his plans to rebuild trust in the competence of state government, tackle the climate crisis head on by making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, expand affordable, quality healthcare, and so much more.
Click here to RSVP to join us on October 9. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em100321&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Photos from Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I'm not asking today, just thanking. (There's also a surprise at the end of this email.)

Our campaign pushed hard over the past month to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and thanks to thousands of folks just like you, we got there. The vast majority of our campaign contributions come from messages like these from people who chip in just a few hard-earned dollars at a time because they believe in the work we’re doing together. That’s incredible.

People like Clarice in Wausau, John in Tomah, Rachel in La Crosse, Carolyn in Horicon, and countless others who pitch in $10 or $25 literally fuel our campaign. The truth is, we wouldn't have the resources to travel across Wisconsin and meet people where they're at without their help.

When grassroots supporters give to an email, a text, or an online ad -- those contributions have a meaningful impact on our campaign. They allow us to hire more staff, expand our digital operation, and reach more Wisconsinites with our message of a better future for everyone in our beautiful state. So I just want to say thank you. I wouldn’t be in this race without the support of this team.

Now, I'll let you get back to enjoying your weekend (I'll be cheering on the Packers!) -- and then, let's continue our important work. After all, if we're going to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat blue, we can't take our foot off the gas for too long.

Forward!

Sarah

P.S. I was on the road yesterday to speak at the rallies for abortion justice in Green Bay and in Oshkosh. It was an honor to join so many determined Wisconsinites who marched for reproductive freedom.

I would like to share some photos from those events with you, but first, I wanted to let you know that small donations to our campaign are what keep us rolling across Wisconsin. If you missed the deadline but would still like to help, please make a small contribution to keep us on the road. Anything you'd be willing to chip in would go a long way.

Donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-oct-21

Photos linked below:

If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Have a question? Reply to this email.

name: VA News Alert
subject: Virginia Dems downgraded (AGAIN)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Another top pollster is calling this race a toss-up
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36968261/309668466/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.5_VNA_10K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBlMzU0Zi04MDI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJrzkT1CsmsdXqAUCwjC19a62GmpE7qjtHZhOf-JJP0=)

| | Derek, we have urgent news:

_Roll Call_ just announced that yet _**another**_ top race-rater downgraded Terry McAuliffe’s chances to keep Virginia blue next month. The news comes on the heels of last week’s shocker, when we learned _The Cook Political Report_ was officially calling Virginia a toss-up.

Look, we can’t sugar-coat this. News reports keep citing example after example of low Democratic turnout and enthusiasm in the Virginia’s governor’s race.

It’s time for Democrats in Virginia and across our country to wake up. We’re two weeks into early voting, and we’re in danger of letting Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump score a huge upset!

clean_body: Another top pollster is calling this race a toss-up | | | = | | Derek, we have urgent news: Roll Call just announced that yet another top race-rater downgraded Terry McAuliffe’s chances to keep Virginia blue next month. The news comes on the heels of last week’s shocker, when we learned The Cook Political Report was officially calling Virginia a toss-up. Look, we can’t sugar-coat this. News reports keep citing example after example of low Democratic turnout and enthusiasm in the Virginia’s governor’s race. It’s time for Democrats in Virginia and across our country to wake up. We’re two weeks into early voting, and we’re in danger of letting Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump score a huge upset! = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = – Team Terry for VA =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. This will mean a loss of $6.6 billion for Indiana - which is a loss of broadband expansion, repairs to roads and bridges, and updates to public transportation systems across Indiana. | _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: I've got to share this with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84iIigCCshtZHLPgDyI70Hi3s1-Q9Z4Fp_RcfwNSzu1KAQLcOZsrQH3r6k7FesGXOOfdc2BOnzt0aW_WLhgMYAG3oYVqQQEdzNfimCI1poF4s0wd2uHP6LR5a7YSKDY9Yrpp5mL2Lb1t0Vyh4v3U-whx5A4sp8_ADdaCFULWw5Dw4VleykobR_9Exj0K_k8KDVg1HKdCuTBNuEC8w0o6Q8mUyvpFdAt97c2Y243wOyZg-wjtk-uZh-9Am0MC1zO-z8P5hPqD_zQZ8nHj6o0uA-wNznzHkSYdyCGyiloY-B2l9/3fu/DMDFKZoLSCWwSvdR8yBybQ/h0/ccOQMNBxPa072bZbMAxQDO6p35BOF33ABnS5jxz_NfA)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84iIigCCshtZHLPgDyI70Hi2zwGdJ0Nrs8FflODuMoawncDpkk-M9MHfw5HY4DmEd-J8SuzTrm98VigmdO0CSnYC52nS_ZC5df2VkccRVl2uNcW-4oIQsF8vCu4bpsgABBBVCOIaaIZIU0iy_M_BGP0_ww6iEf1QuEZo1N7y2ZnuUYbzmEzE-PbnrPeg1qnbwE5qaYZ8bQYJrigNLLZOrk_dofaiNWTefB3iaT6i7jp_cPeUrBq6cyCuz2Z_nFxsK4UVPdV2ny2hl5-x4qkKTEe-LnqU4lyvsVQMKU7IpTGGP/3fu/DMDFKZoLSCWwSvdR8yBybQ/h1/nzZSszBozerKtI529OTlf3LT04PORZJVQChrDk2tvo8) Derek – I just got some urgent news I need to share with you:

**FIRST:** CNN named me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection – in a race experts say will decide Senate control.

**THEN:** Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear me with attack ads, turn Georgia red and win back the majority for Mitch McConnell.

**NOW: We set a $50,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against these GOP attacks, but we're still falling short of the critical resources we need to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just _one_ seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. **I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first-ever Black senator and help lead the fight for our Democratic priorities – but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.**

**[So I'm personally asking, Derek: will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Common Good VA – before our grassroots-response deadline at midnight – to help close our budget gap, keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84rZ2wHuSHm6XloSu6wPuRn0aFgcWReoDZKxqgfsmU_47t2tiWEykWQnhKQfCOadM_napwkMbM0priW-_ukKgP4JpYwGjx9A1cO4CO1lZ6XpNiW8DRnGVkRadrA62aD7xT3kD18SMUlPFYatO-xTETpEqmOeQs5r62CKQvdDxSB9uVfsdr6ZSK1FqxRrsUOZYyx9YgZa7FJGMAnvJaSQiNqYQdZwqOoZR_J8MaXQ71EMa3uKx2rzeu8uE3qwhbFAK4uSsUXU70SFpr4X0YtE3ERsB6JD9huEPaLETY6MKVa-uIiJzcsEmSyyVSTXTVW2jqQ/3fu/DMDFKZoLSCWwSvdR8yBybQ/h2/q_CdMlJT7_lBDi0zFTKc0-boGzYoixEaX9FTi10YHGs) ** [ ****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84rZ2wHuSHm6XloSu6wPuRn0aFgcWReoDZKxqgfsmU_47sCQb0N01SLmz4HRDqVDv8dFFcAyuT6FoDvrsIEno18MlKtOjXwd7QpVuGS7DDwFA0Iue1zxRIx8b-hoJd26zljrfRNYWFtiMDQaYokVX9e5qHm7XXoSfhF5vP41wmstq2Cf0kvgxGVxXJMTTJJZqyK7NZAGdhfGNOHkkaRskGo34JI3BygTqxqXqqOx7XB-1eqha4tuALqi0PW4HLo5EcHjd6-uab8VJixYVAYpmM_B5GLNa4ikJRpCZcEmIMpA2J28vCcaohga5wNDVuDWRGg/3fu/DMDFKZoLSCWwSvdR8yBybQ/h3/sJovFwGe3oWpHAnBN2vzvdqDvF7bvPLx9Ht5EcX56KY)**[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84rZ2wHuSHm6XloSu6wPuRn0aFgcWReoDZKxqgfsmU_47PFL0mPZCOWBR7qjhrWmRo-7RXc7OJSYm_WOYJCf_hTv_0CTBVk5ceFNbEMck7urDIge9Zhfe8KFAKnFTbnMwYlS0ADPPT_-ez9VMp6m0kHWWwENnH6Ugf3rWv2DWdUnOyc8goQQIFiEOu2j3qmo2ddLzi2izoRbvx0xXhp8z1XhrhhPm0dyU-Ft_Nl263UDhr7PEjtt4AuwUPGWN6teMjuS2yMsVnxkPcmrWpc9ncWxHbXFre5S0IoEG5P2tKeEtx6Nj8wA1hEUTnMCeB2dong/3fu/DMDFKZoLSCWwSvdR8yBybQ/h4/pJzVexmgqzRUWHThJX_2NmCHjBuL5mlcgxA8kyQnK-4)

THEN: Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear me with attack ads, turn Georgia red and win back the majority for Mitch McConnell. NOW: We set a $50,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against these GOP attacks, but we're still falling short of the critical resources we need to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first-ever Black senator and help lead the fight for our Democratic priorities – but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. Any missed goal stacks the deck against our communities, against our movement and against the progressive future we’ve worked tirelessly for. So thank you in advance for pitching in. – Raphael | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Jeff King
subject: “We’re coming for you”
body:
Christians in Afghanistan are getting calls from the Taliban saying "We're coming for you." [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c469%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=y9ppbQjqk68enHrx2yNMiQ&sysid=1)
Dear Faithful Friend, ** ** **Christians in Afghanistan are getting calls from the Taliban saying "We're coming for you."** ** ** **They are knocking on doors looking for those who don't come to mosque to find the Christians.** ** ** Afghanistan was already a very dangerous place for Christians but the Taliban takeover has made the situation critical for the incredibly brave believers that live there. You see, almost all Christians in Afghanistan are converts from Islam, making them apostates under according to Islam and Mohammed. That means they are under a death sentence. So most of them live out their Christianity "underground" but some of them have been open about their faith. These are the most vulnerable. And while their fate seems hopeless, we are committed to save every brave Christian we can from being killed at the hands of the Taliban. This is the work we do. To rescue, to bandage, and to build the persecuted Church. [**Which is why I am asking you for a $30 gift that will help us serve these Christians in Afghanistan and other places that are under severe threat.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66854%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tSCkRih6T6lBNll2E%2b0H%2fA&sysid=1) Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Jeff King, and I'm president of International Christian Concern. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66865%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MgK3rc9t6kPXKxlCCHObIw&sysid=1) Every year, 200 million Christians face persecution - but the press is silent about them. Therefore, many pastors and lay people don't even know that there is a war being waged on the church worldwide. ICC is like no other group helping persecuted Christians today. We go where no one else can or will go, where missionaries know they will be murdered. We work underground with indigenous Christians who have already put their lives on the altar knowing they may be killed for what they do. When a pastor is murdered, we rescue his family, getting them to a safe place with food and shelter and the ability to provide for themselves for the long term. When a church is attacked, we help to get it back up and functioning. We work in the most dangerous places in the world including Afghanistan, Nigeria's Middle Belt, and even North Korea. _Months before the American withdrawal from Afghanistan, we were rescuing Christians behind the scenes. We knew what was coming and we removed some of the most vulnerable Christians._ _ _ _Since the fall of Kabul, our work goes on._ _ _ _For those who escape we will be there. For those who stay, we will help them hide and also to spread the faith for those know they have the message of life for the dead and dying around them._ _ _ **But the total cost for rescue and ongoing care for these survivors in Afghanistan alone will be well over $1 million, and we're going to need all the help we can get.** ** ** [**So please, if you are able, donate $30 today to help us provide hope for persecuted Christians around the world.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66866%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jhMkmNZnZJxdtpFwccky3A&sysid=1) Persecution is a complex problem that can't be solved with just a handout, so we go deeper. Most organizations "parachute in" during a crisis. They throw money around and then leave when the headlines dry up. That's not ICC. We stick with persecution victims and work with them for the long term. We don't simply offer a bandage to "the wound" of persecution. We seek to break the cycle of persecution entirely. [ **Will you donate just $30 today to provide us with the resources we desperately need to bandage the survivors of persecution or to build the church in the toughest places in the world?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66867%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z2XfVHKEtZVBaL%2fBCmNDUw&sysid=1) ** ** In Afghanistan, $1000 allows us to care for a Christian family rescued from being murdered by the Taliban, but we help victims of persecution all over the world.
* In Nigeria, Islamists steal the land of farmers at gunpoint. For only $30 we can get that farmer back to farming and feeding his family again.
* In India, $100 allows us to equip a church planter with a new bicycle that will double or triple the number of churches he can plant.
* In North Korea, $200 allows us to send multiple gospel messages in via radio.

I know you can't walk into a village in India to supply a church planter with a new bicycle or 100 Bibles. You can't rescue a pastor in Afghanistan about to be murdered by the Taliban or stream the gospel into North Korea. But working together, you and I can do all this and more! [**Your donation of $30 or more today could literally save the life of a Christian in Afghanistan or another persecuted area.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66868%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JssNcmeSjMkSeVu8fUXQWg&sysid=1) And you can't even imagine how grateful these survivors are to be touched by the family of God across the ocean after losing everything. They see the Father in action, working through you, and rescuing them against all odds when they are at their lowest. Watching our donors care for their brothers and sisters, I am continually reminded of Matthew 25:40: "Truly I tell you, whatever you did for one of the least of these brothers and sisters of mine, you did for me." Thank you in advance for your support and God Bless, Jeff King President, International Christian Concern P.S. [**Christians in Afghanistan are facing extreme danger. Those in hiding in the country or out need emergency life support. Please partner with me today as we Build and Bandage the church in the most dangerous places in the world.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66869%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h0yTYBGVkpFHLJtpX5EHPg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66860%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iUvDG9E0fLD8Hlfbk6UTbA&sysid=1) | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66861%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RccbWPEYNGnsz2gjf2X9Zg&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66862%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j6kqr8H2vMlhptjoRBKTsw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66863%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l1S4s%2bAX%2fK%2fy11A8XsB1FA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66864%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Za%2fpXMcFzXx9ysmmjCbbA&sysid=1)
---|---|---|---
[**www.persecution.org**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66875%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NRQ6C1DelEGPRHQqC6Jfpw&sysid=1)

2020 Pennsylvania Ave. NW, # 941
Washington D.C. 20006-1846

**[Privacy Policy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66876%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OjP1EFAnq2sguCE1fxZKuA&sysid=1) **
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c469%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=y9ppbQjqk68enHrx2yNMiQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c469%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=y9ppbQjqk68enHrx2yNMiQ&sysid=1)
