name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmo5mv3upnqa45nbon3kqk1jmm77411fhl3m9fmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ie2o74cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zn6rd5niff4d64u432oi8p41c16rfp95lgbuvso0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ie2o74cth2bs) These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ , and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And Mark Levin—the “Great One”—gave Hillsdale a rare first edition set of these famous essays. They’re on display at our Allan P. Kirby, Jr. Center in Washington, D.C. It’s safe to say we’re pretty fond of _The Federalist Papers_ around here. In fact, that’s why we developed a course dedicated just to these important essays. There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, [_**"The Federalist Papers,”**_ ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z62po2pgirl2ev2kp9li0o7ehr226bj3prc8rtjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ie2o74cth2bs)on DVD today with your generous donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. You can learn more about this special DVD box set using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztc8gffsf981mkotlbnogqg8v57ri146mkaoqqno_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ie2o74cth2bs)** Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll reserve your copy of **[_“The Federalist Papers”_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2jhulvo8kiontack4f81babf950el7hitv7on5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9ie2o74cth2bs)** _****_ DVD box set today. Supplies are limited and I’d hate for you to miss out. Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

_Should_ Roe v. Wade _be the law of the land?_ | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36972222/309682392/-191020819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3YWUzZi05NTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mEn3GuLDuxuIBjaY4hWyMvL-wquirlfTVMXuFvvOE=&emci=68145f61-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=96b7ae3f-9524-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36972223/309682393/-191020819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3YWUzZi05NTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mEn3GuLDuxuIBjaY4hWyMvL-wquirlfTVMXuFvvOE=&emci=68145f61-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=96b7ae3f-9524-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Peter,
When the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Texas Republicans’ anti-choice law banning most abortions to take effect, right-wing politicians in southern states celebrated. They quickly realized that the door is now open to gutting _Roe v. Wade_ and ending years-long legal fights to decisively roll back women’s health rights.
**In South Carolina and Tennessee:** Six-week bans similar to Texas’s are waiting to be argued in the courts.
**In Mississippi:** Lawmakers banned abortion after 15 weeks of pregnancy. The Supreme Court will take up the case this fall.
**In Georgia and Oklahoma:** Republicans passed “heartbeat bills” banning most abortions as early as six weeks. Georgia’s law may be enacted following the Mississippi ruling, and Oklahoma Republicans are preparing to defend theirs in the courts.
Peter, with women’s health rights under attack in so many states in our region and across the country, we’re conducting a poll to judge how people in your area feel about reproductive choice — and it’s just one question.
**[_POLL: Do you believe_ Roe v. clean_body: Reproductive choice is under attack. | Should Roe v. Wade be the law of the land? | | ---|--- Peter, When the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Texas Republicans’ anti-choice law banning most abortions to take effect, right-wing politicians in southern states celebrated. They quickly realized that the door is now open to gutting Roe v. Wade and ending years-long legal fights to decisively roll back women’s health rights. In South Carolina and Tennessee: Six-week bans similar to Texas’s are waiting to be argued in the courts. In Mississippi: Lawmakers banned abortion after 15 weeks of pregnancy. The Supreme Court will take up the case this fall. In Georgia and Oklahoma: Republicans passed “heartbeat bills” banning most abortions as early as six weeks. Georgia’s law may be enacted following the Mississippi ruling, and Oklahoma Republicans are preparing to defend theirs in the courts. Peter, with women’s health rights under attack in so many states in our region and across the country, we’re conducting a poll to judge how people in your area feel about reproductive choice — and it’s just one question. | | ---|--- Thank you for sharing your input, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Team DeSantis
subject: ICYMI: Felix Rodriguez Receives Governor’s Medal of Freedom
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8877096303766eda24671fdc57a15f6c28483acae1cd67bb4f159b9ca9eb538fc9f8e23c89f850b907a79c8e552604992299c34a28e1543e580c322e1b2544c3e53aa1d1ba03c71e

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94869aa6782cccf41153c80b56e2551c568badcc79ef490fa92225bc75cad1a91e7fa7c03c5f801ac3ca1ca7b3e5bae3baf270ffaa09d68c

Peter,

ICYMI: Governor DeSantis awarded the Governor’s Medal of Freedom to Felix Rodriguez. Mr. Rodriguez is only the second recipient of the highest honor in the state.

Throughout his life, Felix Rodriguez has fought for freedom and liberation. He was born in Cuba in 1941, but after his family’s possessions were seized by Fidel Castro’s tyrannical government, he dedicated his life to fighting for freedom and liberty.

Felix joined the famous Brigade 2506, which carried out the Bay of Pigs invasion, worked with CIA, and participated in the capture and execution of Marxist leader Che Guevara. Not only that, but after becoming a U.S. citizen he joined the United States Army during the Vietnam War.

Felix’s firsthand knowledge of the pain and suffering caused by oppressive Communist dictatorships is reflected in his dedication to service. We know the horrors caused by these oppressive regimes and it takes men like Felix to remind us how important it is we rebuff those attempting to plunge us into those dangerous policies and systems here in America.

There is nobody who has demonstrated a greater commitment to liberating those most oppressed. As Democrats embrace Socialist policies like a warm hug, we should remember sacrifices those like Felix Rodriguez have made to eradicate that tyrannical ideology and continue to fight back in preservation of freedom here in America.

Thanks to Felix Rodriguez, countless individuals were able to experience the blessings of freedom, and Governor DeSantis was proud to recognize his heroism with the Governor’s Medal of Freedom.

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94869aa6782cccf41153c80b56e2551c568badcc79ef490fa92225bc75cad1a91e7fa7c03c5f801ac3ca1ca7b3e5bae3baf270ffaa09d68c

name: Karen Bass (personal)
subject: No major movement is won alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
body:
Team --

Before I decided to run for mayor of Los Angeles, I kept going back to one question: "How can I not do everything I can to help move our city forward?"

I grew up in Los Angeles. I've been a community organizer, a nurse, a Physician Assistant, an assemblymember, and a congresswoman. In the past 18 months, I've witnessed the city I love experience once-in-a-generation challenges. And in that time, I knew I had to do more -- for this city and for every single Angeleno who couldn't pay the bills, who had lost their job, lost a loved one, or simply lost hope.

We're at a crossroads, and I'm running for mayor to bring my lifelong commitment to social and economic justice straight to city hall. No major movement was won alone, team, so I'm turning to you.

Our campaign set a goal to raise $50,000 before tonight at midnight. We're just shy of that goal, and I'm looking to you to help close that gap. If you're ready to boldly rebuild Los Angeles in a way that includes everyone -- chip in now before tonight's deadline » **[https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-1313493337369080064](https://act.myngp.com/el/yxO5Kt8HS0vIlW6C1DNx6F7Bf0BJqCZcdwc283D_ycw=/FULDJLqWiWfQIW_nCO2mPGLIeLJOjEJDchcqmJNeg_k=?ms=em21_211003_fr2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211003_fr2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211003_fr2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

This is the first big challenge our campaign has gone up against. I'm hoping I can count on you.

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022

Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States

name: John Cranley
subject: Saving the planet has to start right now. Today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
YOUR ENDORSEMENT REQUESTED. | Friend – Back in August, the U.N. issued a dire warning about the future of our planet. **We’re now on a certain course towards catastrophic global warming and extreme weather.** But more recently, we’ve learned that _even if nations achieve their goals of reducing carbon emissions_ , we’re still headed in the wrong direction. **We need to take bold, decisive action at every level of government, starting right now.** That’s why I’ve committed to implementing innovative renewable energy plans in at least ten Ohio counties a year as governor — exactly as I did in Cincinnati. **We’ll build major solar power installations across the state, creating 1,300 jobs a year and reducing Ohio’s carbon footprint by replacing fossil fuels with clean energy sources._It just makes sense._** **_[I need to know if you support our plan, friend. Become an Official Citizen Endorser of our clean energy proposals today to say you’re with us>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36973074/309684843/479250549?refcode=ea.f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&mc=ea.f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjliNzg3NC05OTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YezbpY5V4xLhxCA96pt07DIq6qcsnlvSk2_cRaPB9eM=&emci=1270e4a5-8d24-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=22604289)_** **[ENDORSE THE PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36973075/309684844/479250549?refcode=ea.f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&mc=ea.f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjliNzg3NC05OTI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YezbpY5V4xLhxCA96pt07DIq6qcsnlvSk2_cRaPB9eM=&emci=1270e4a5-8d24-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=f69b7874-9924-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=22604289)** When it comes to clean energy and defending against climate change, Ohio is on the wrong track. Mike DeWine and Republicans in the legislature helped block clean energy companies from expanding into Ohio — all to appease their fossil fuel donors. clean_body: YOUR ENDORSEMENT REQUESTED. | Friend – Back in August, the U.N. issued a dire warning about the future of our planet. We’re now on a certain course towards catastrophic global warming and extreme weather. But more recently, we’ve learned that even if nations achieve their goals of reducing carbon emissions , we’re still headed in the wrong direction. We need to take bold, decisive action at every level of government, starting right now. That’s why I’ve committed to implementing innovative renewable energy plans in at least ten Ohio counties a year as governor — exactly as I did in Cincinnati. We’ll build major solar power installations across the state, creating 1,300 jobs a year and reducing Ohio’s carbon footprint by replacing fossil fuels with clean energy sources.It just makes sense. When it comes to clean energy and defending against climate change, Ohio is on the wrong track. Mike DeWine and Republicans in the legislature helped block clean energy companies from expanding into Ohio — all to appease their fossil fuel donors. Peter,

The fight to ban CRT continues, and things are really heating up.

_One Colorado father, Derrick Wilburn, bravely stood up against CRT at a local school board meeting._ After his powerful words, the school board voted 3-2 in favor of banning the instruction of CRT curriculum.

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58457274:6irbjG2N2:m:1:3253819041:FA2BCE1CA6A9761D148CBD6EE749BCD1:r)

Supporters like you have helped us become a resource for parents and teachers across the nation who see CRT for what it really is: dangerous, Marxist indoctrination.

**The Teachers ' Unions are trying their best to silence us.** From supporting teachers who "vow to defy community demanded bans on CRT" all the way to hiding the CRT curriculum from parents and administrators, Teachers' Unions are determined to ruin the education system.

This is our chance to take the lead and leave CRT and the power-drunk Teachers' Unions behind. **Donate to PACT to help us defeat the Teachers Unions.**

| | It's Time To Paint Virginia Fuchsia Greetings Team Blanding Volunteers! It has been quite a week! We are feeling so much love and support and my team members and I are extremely grateful for your willingness to volunteer with our campaign. As we near election day, November 2nd, we need all hands on deck in order to win this election and ensure that liberation is a human right not a privilege for all Virginians. Whether you signed up to canvass, phone bank, fundraise, or for general support, your time and energy will play a major role in the outcome of this election. Here are just a few things you can do TODAY to help us win:
* Follow our campaign @prinblandingva ( Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram) @princessblandingva (TikTok). Share our posts across your social media platforms and encourage others to like/follow/share as well.
* Call or text 10 people you know and share information about our campaign and encourage them to do the same. [This is so important as we have seen already, the two-party system will do everything in their power to silence me, which is why I have been shut out from the debates, left off of polls and deprived of equal media coverage]
* Help organize voter registration and/or transport of community members to the polls and tell them to vote for Princess Blanding
* Need handouts our posters? Let us know and we will coordinate to get some to you.

Early voting is underway! The time is NOW to activate and mobilize our fellow community members to get to the polls. Historic electoral data here in Virginia shows that less than 50% of registered voters in Virginia actually turn out to vote during the gubernatorial race. We must knock on every door, call everyone we know and ensure that plans are in place to show up and turn out in very large numbers at the polls. This is an important and historic election because Virginia has a candidate on the ballot who represents the working class and the oppressed, who will fight for the people, and is not beholden to corporate donors. This time it’s different, we know what we have to do to win this race, and with your help we will claim nothing short of victory on November 2, 2021 and beyond. I look forward to working collaboratively with you moving forward to ensure that Liberation is a human right, not a privilege for all Virginians.
Princess BlandingOur POWER is in unity. (If you’d like additional training on volunteering, please let us know by emailing volunteer[@princessblanding.com ](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/64Nn7MdFW/c?w=HaBEKA3LgML20tGwDlQ9Tp6gMOYfCZZlzklVfxB4J_k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250YWN0QHByaW5jZXNzYmxhbmRpbmcuY29tIiwiciI6IjNmZmM4NjYzLTYzZTEtNDY2Yy02MWIwLWNlNzI5YjhlNDgzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjlhNTFlOGE3LTZkYzMtNDk3My05Yjg3LTBjMGI4ZmFhNjU2YiJ9)so we can schedule a time)

clean_body: | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | It's Time To Paint Virginia Fuchsia Greetings Team Blanding Volunteers! It has been quite a week! We are feeling so much love and support and my team members and I are extremely grateful for your willingness to volunteer with our campaign. As we near election day, November 2nd, we need all hands on deck in order to win this election and ensure that liberation is a human right not a privilege for all Virginians. Whether you signed up to canvass, phone bank, fundraise, or for general support, your time and energy will play a major role in the outcome of this election. Here are just a few things you can do TODAY to help us win: Follow our campaign @prinblandingva ( Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram) @princessblandingva (TikTok). Share our posts across your social media platforms and encourage others to like/follow/share as well. Call or text 10 people you know and share information about our campaign and encourage them to do the same. [This is so important as we have seen already, the two-party system will do everything in their power to silence me, which is why I have been shut out from the debates, left off of polls and deprived of equal media coverage] Help organize voter registration and/or transport of community members to the polls and tell them to vote for Princess Blanding Need handouts our posters? Let us know and we will coordinate to get some to you. Early voting is underway! The time is NOW to activate and mobilize our fellow community members to get to the polls. Historic electoral data here in Virginia shows that less than 50% of registered voters in Virginia actually turn out to vote during the gubernatorial race. We must knock on every door, call everyone we know and ensure that plans are in place to show up and turn out in very large numbers at the polls. This is an important and historic election because Virginia has a candidate on the ballot who represents the working class and the oppressed, who will fight for the people, and is not beholden to corporate donors. This time it’s different, we know what we have to do to win this race, and with your help we will claim nothing short of victory on November 2, 2021 and beyond. I look forward to working collaboratively with you moving forward to ensure that Liberation is a human right, not a privilege for all Virginians. Princess BlandingOur POWER is in unity. (If you’d like additional training on volunteering, please let us know by emailing volunteer we can schedule a time) | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ][IMG]

Hi there, Dave here.

I just saw a concerning poll that shows Trump-wannabe, right-wing
extremist Josh Mandel leading in the Republican primary.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1007&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]So please (and urgently), will you chip in $25 to ensure our campaign
has the resources to compete with Mandel and the GOP’s billionaire
backers?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1008&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4965?t=1009&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4966?t=1010&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4967?t=1011&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4968?t=1012&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1013&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Other Amount

According to polls, Mandel is leading the Republican field because of his
“consistent and unwavering support of President Trump.”

Don’t forget, friend: Josh Mandel called refugees alligators and
compared Joe Biden’s administration to Nazi Germany. We simply cannot
allow that kind of hatred and bigotry anywhere near the U.S. Senate.

Josh Mandel is a threat to Ohio. That’s why I’m emailing you now.

To compete with our Republican opponents, we need to raise enough money to
hire organizers, pay for ads, and build a grassroots campaign that meets
Ohio voters where they’re at.

This race will determine whether or not Democrats keep the Senate, so our
strategy is to hold nothing back. We’re investing in early rapid response
to counter Republican talking points and make sure folks know who Tim is
fighting for and what we’re up against.

We need you to make a donation immediately to stay on track.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1014&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Will you chip in to flip this Senate seat blue and expand our
Democratic majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1015&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4965?t=1016&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4964?t=1020&akid=1070%2E3611125%2Evx93sf ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Dave Chase
Campaign Manager
Tim for Ohio

body:
[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gJeh0jm3vS1F4o8KvFx2rGO3hh3anp_nqKS_2-G5C-qFC4e4cW6d5ZCbiLekp7SSXZknRHOikECLGKbXEyJyomm3KAPAa3DfL4bZS972ORNdo2nYEuC_cVaTjUb8X6Kw0xDcN79HVmk7sIxUFUQezIkpYjrQMcRjzek7dtOw4mqOM_BBvxDftkkwsQjckEWO3RZtWcJoi283jcOPcgOYP6aQGcbsz4U1HjIoFqHMVmhnrSCl7L_DNQiIqRYC65dBLPw12p8Apr8pC41CWJ1rrFx2JHVqVAz-aK_PG5Nr1nKN5OhOmv5eJSeSmD5eHrd0zkDY5tkLwMLu1TaLOEBYOFYDAnGogE_C_Aya-BXo-5OQ5ReCIqm0kjK-oP8_XMOpSt3t8K1amO2eC7Nb80v9vzqBF6Ga7__w2jivhqllp4pF)

Friend,

Did you see the recent article in the Washington Examiner about our race to restore conservative leadership back to West Houston? If you haven't read it yet, you can find it [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gJeh0jm3vS1F4o8KvFx2rGO3hh3anp_nqKS_2-G5C-qFC4e4cW6d5ZCbiLekp7SSXZknRHOikECLGKbXEyJyomm3KAPAa3DfL4bZS972ORNdo2nYEuC_cVaTjUb8X6Kw0xDcN79HVmk7sIxUFUQezIkpYjrQMcRjzek7dtOw4mqOM_BBvxDftkkwsQjckEWO3RZtWcJoi283jcOPcgOYP6bLZe-4b8T639DKLdaJwiuif4xH1LIa3FUlN4tSFg0r6YRrBAwuiZvS8yb6WSPUpZOZMp7NFVNagzX8McYw4Pg-ehvkmGzPpajFIFDlJXhWApwF8VcUo0MYM_w2urUGqAXg-Qah8ipuk367bXVZKzVbf9imX4-VLYNEYehdq7JAIdRv1gjdv0-OJ8JFqwOUtZIVM4xErnGXgyDIv4i0I1aW) or read it below!

Sincerely,
James

**New Texas congressional district may elect third Black House Republican**
By Kate Scanlon | October 2nd, 2021

Texas lawmakers recently introduced their draft proposal for a _[new congressional map](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gMIyzmu9EGqt55wjMBzCYFec3JlZcNl_tp7FbuZZRd2umQVao6m97yMtkPbflZdSvC-d_QmV0YU-DPS8N5NAhq7CrwcWMQIvgwhKalmVth5KARJXBPSDWBrKOwkHLE1wSUR1SA43BnzUkui828wqfZ0QB1_eWKzH-qYDJsspL0JSY7okE86Ogb6kmGDS7uZoBpA6hn5X35TyuKwCiv5T3dzq-Vdqo6KHvKBnBD4JctVewfbHHlYucXKvlnXa35twIsSL9rq2wzOt2GoBZE8Te6XF8yoo4cUj4JJP9M_Qoqs60PzI1XRLqWj6n0JC47vLyh5rOaWQwwP6CP41fhOzgvsS_J7bNXuwZe5r4SSumyL79vDoMGMxNBi7DdWxGas15y_xpJahd2tSGSGcuq3m3NI%3D)_ that may pave the way for a third Black Republican to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives.
The Lone Star State will add two new congressional seats to its delegation after it reported population growth ahead of the 2020 census, bringing the state’s delegation from 36 to 38 members. The draft proposal — which must still be approved through the legislative process — would create a 37th seat in Austin that would be overwhelmingly Democratic and a 38th seat in Houston that leans Republican.
Although the map has yet to be approved, the race for the new districts has already begun. This week, Republican Wesley Hunt, an Army combat veteran, announced a bid for the party’s nomination in Texas's 38th District.
Should Hunt be elected to Congress, he would be one of just three Black Republicans in that chamber, joining Reps. Byron Donalds of Florida and Burgess Owens of Utah, _[according to the House Press Gallery](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gMftWnxM9zWBvijBrUhGLmAMYYB87bAjFfQAmfn8fnD2tOIyDlVEnK1XaLBCnnFa-DmxeZipcxJx-p60lSlOYBFZLkqsJDdGkNLr8QqD23FlF5X4mLP-1zjGimKaYMkkdfE_DUJ3ReCsq48X706JJw7Lm8y-ayYJk7WZQNhqgm938GL8FTRHZh3plqKqXcOIl-gz_tQ7wHzgcELH5IKtP3xJZXFnVMKdxvf9Ya-TwaQlzsVXj0TubeGBYOyYD0sWUoIwmXvCxMhiVA3aL9wJuGLjURHNKx69juXm3_-AMuyQ)_. Conversely, 55 Black Democrats serve in the current Congres
Hunt previously _[ran](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gGNKgZuESzlYOPE8k7dmXdX6MwnfNJVPzTNG71t347LB7NRriBgI8Sj8mhLyRrVmNcIImr9OmVE4TeJTxvNQ5X2lEy0tpk6ClZudC1sGqkH2JtVh9qGYp-Y6dV3MbwdI0f2QI03qkCZdNAQArXpJylpfs0tdpEMbnH2lJAooO0NV5oH14dt43v0NVERqZUTxd215lYj1Z3rW9Ts0Nq7dyesAzdyiIwY7JrUOl83QDsRTw05_21_fNM2dSUMf6-O4PTPFPD6ziMacZlshhKIdAMdIpHFmvLZ4D2kuO2M8ft1w)_ against Rep. Lizzie Pannill Fletcher in Texas's 7th Congressional District, losing the race by 3 percentage points. The proposed congressional map would make Fletcher’s Houston-area seat more solidly Democratic.
Hunt received national support in that race, including an endorsement from then-President Donald Trump. In a statement this week announcing his candidacy, Hunt said he will “complete the mission I first embarked on in 2019.”
“The gravity of this election has never been greater, and in the 250 days [Joe Biden](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gJeh0jm3vS1F4o8KvFx2rGOT36Ja1EswoC6t8Mc4AAHCff0wNJObAyNDXL8VrvNpm767HI50YfgYTYT9aVI_2L8_xuFrzcVOSqBvxxgO97SnEOrkDrKjjzYphWT50bQAedYO-xY3mmatv751k8hT3WXLepfglC9fU1eDKeU07PubvWSN9A7xnKJJFpEDzG5v18PHFcmltta2C0haeFX5RS0OBJLJNrgxLAAii6mk3NUR_tc6zr28CHus1U62-B75jfU5Oh-zTjXRs9-KA8f0i8a5pUBvv30bFzLfisucJM526wdG5u5wS6xOV9Yhnmw7V7v0QatCc0oIDz4SoEpazOeZP53EUv_PdEDpbg331Odj) has been in office, our country has felt the atrocious policies instituted by a Democrat-controlled government that include record-high inflation, a failing economy, a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, which claimed the lives of 13 service members, vaccine mandates by executive order, and a preventable surge in illegal immigration across our southern border,” Hunt said.
Hunt’s campaign subsequently announced an endorsement from House Minority Leader [Kevin McCarthy](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5ddb8d09de4048e59a65a901b3e9346e&_e=mBXbn-SoTlMvMke4yqU_gJeh0jm3vS1F4o8KvFx2rGODX_uHh2GzMVtCeG5MszWCGgqZ-vnRVLeYFb1i_wd4bMQkVZ1GYkiqgpwpCYOtJRiVe_0oKQ4CHXAyJk5n6VRf0ogp6c2y4BAB8MhbcF-SEXZK4CG3yftfMpGfzqtuBNjveSVRHd7WrUOGVsrwCKSn3hFlP6D5od9ZFMge4HHd4Eznc-LzTLjXuMNFNUPYdvmTTj56MCO9hV48MU43EuiVzgLsdUcRmM6ht_DCcc4dbP7KLM_1eZMLzCPJ5IkBImIFvGcgTvvuCoThN3L04iIUcd8uyVzFgbme6tU2wZD57ysAQlmWooSGmvfrxtcY2fxhmeyb4RJbdbCcksni4lgf) and a third-quarter fundraising haul of over $1 million.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: Thank you
body:
I appreciate you being on Team Ramirez. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=893c11634c&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

I know you receive an overwhelming amount of emails and messages from my campaign, and I appreciate you being on Team Ramirez as we work tirelessly to win Virginia’s 7th district.

I wanted to take a moment and explain why we are doing what we do online. Right now Abigail Spanberger is raising money and advertising non-stop because she knows we are neck and neck with her campaign. We are wholeheartedly determined to get her out of office and undo the damage she has done and will continue to do to our country. It’s thanks to supporters like you, Friend, that we can continue to fight so hard.

Thanks to you, we have raised well over $300,000 in the first quarter since the launch of our campaign. We are now one step closer to taking back the House in 2022, one step closer to taking back Virginia, and one step closer to taking back our Country.

I cannot thank you enough for your support.

Thank you again,

Tina Ramirez
[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=a70d697459&e=ae0ea222da)

subject: I know it’s late, but I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
match expiring
| | |
---
| | Derek, I know it’s late, but I wanted to make sure you got one last reminder to _**[make a matched contribution and help me hit my midnight $250,000 goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36977385/309717145/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.8_TM_10V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA0YzY5OS1iMjI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p31M85z9eAD72PS4kpNVH3M93AWkKlmqwTR9fxJnEls=)**_ — we’re still $4,500 or so short, and your contribution could be the one that puts us over the top.

Look, I’ll level with you: sometimes I get worried about the state of this race. Polls are dangerously close, Glenn is outraising us, and there’s so much on the line.

I mean, we’re fighting to defend voting rights, protect reproductive rights, support working families and invest in education — and our opponent is a far-right culture warrior who wants to ban abortion and roll back Virginia’s progress.

He’s spreading anti-vaccine rhetoric and he said he’d vote for Donald Trump in 2024 at our last debate.

The stakes are really, really high, Derek.

So tonight, it’s really important that we hit our fundraising goal — and I hope you’ll make a matched contribution to help us get there. Remember: if you chip in before midnight, your impact will be doubled by an anonymous supporter.

Click here to make a secure, matched contribution right now: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trm_2021_em?refcode=20211003.8_TM_10V](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36977388/309717171/-2023814932?refcode=20211003.8_TM_10V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA0YzY5OS1iMjI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p31M85z9eAD72PS4kpNVH3M93AWkKlmqwTR9fxJnEls=)**_

Thank you for being on my team,

Terry

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

_If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/581c0c1e-c523-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/5904c699-b224-ec11-981f-501ac510a405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA0YzY5OS1iMjI0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p31M85z9eAD72PS4kpNVH3M93AWkKlmqwTR9fxJnEls=&id=108609855)._

They know that if they defeat Mariannette, odds are they keep the U.S. House. We have to fight back harder than ever before — can we count on you to step up right now? | Pelosi’s handpicked candidate, Christina Bohannan, is going to do whatever it takes to defeat Mariannette. We must not allow that to happen. With your help, we can fire Nancy Pelosi, win back the House, and keep this seat red. Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a fellow veteran and a true leader. I need her back with me in Congress to continue standing strong against Joe Biden’s disastrous administration and the woke mob. In service, Tom Cotton Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?
